top_signals.title: Soybean Oil Hits Three-Week High as US-Iran Ceasefire Dissolves
top_signals.summary: Chicago soybean oil futures climbed to a three-week high after fresh US military strikes on Iran sparked a rally in crude prices, raising the prospect of greater demand for biofuel feedstocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire Is ‘Over’ After Strikes | The Pulse 7/8/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Mike Bell, RBC BlueBay Market Strategy Head; Ionela Ciolan, Wilfried Martens Centre for European Studies Research Officer  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ESMA turns spotlight on crypto custody risks after MiCA transition
top_signals.summary: The EU securities regulator will assess custody providers’ key management, incident response and reliance on third-party technology providers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 property firm slams ‘opportunistic, one-sided, inadequate’ takeover offer
top_signals.summary: Real estate investment trust Segro has issued a strongly-worded rebuttal of the £12.6bn takeover bid tabled by its US rival. In a scathing updated to investors, the FTSE 100 property firm branded Prologis’s offer “opportunistic, one-sided and inadequate”, after the American investment behemoth proposed combining the two companies into a mammoth investment trust last month. [...]
